name: The Waning Pact
specialty: A band of skilled assassins, known for their precision in neutralizing targets with minimal collateral damage.

members.name: Serafina Larkwood
members.note: Her eyes, two different colors, mark her as a child of a forbidden union.

members.name: Gideon Thorne
members.note: He carries a set of ancient, cursed arrows that seem to guide him to his targets.

members.name: Alaric Stonefist
members.note: His warhammer is enchanted with a rune that glows ominously when he's angered.

visual: They wear plain, black leather armor adorned with white, stitched crosses, blending in the Undercity crowds. Each member carries a small, white feather tied to their clothing, a symbol of the Patchwork Saints.
reputation_note: They are feared by criminals but respected by the citizens of the Undercity. Rumor has it that their contract is always fulfilled, and they never betray a client.
